response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong staff-level engineering credentials, cloud platform experience, and recent work with AI agent infrastructure, he lacks the required 8+ years of production-grade AI/ML development. His background is primarily in general software engineering, data infrastructure, and web development, with only 2 months of exposure to AI-agent work. Critical gaps include no demonstrated expertise with vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM optimization, multi-agent systems, or the customer-facing AI technical leadership required for this consulting-heavy role. The absence of Python experience compounds the gap.
strengths: Current role at re:cinq involves MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing recent engagement with AI systems
Staff-level technical credibility with strong TypeScript/Node.js production experience and proven ability to build complex infrastructure at scale
Data pipeline and cloud platform experience (AWS CDK, Dunnhumby's real-time metadata systems) demonstrates understanding of infrastructure patterns relevant to AI workflows
concerns: Only 2 months in current AI role—insufficient depth to demonstrate the required 8+ years of production AI/ML solution development
No Python expertise despite being a primary language requirement; background lacks evidence of building LLM applications, model optimization, or AI systems
No demonstrated knowledge of vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI), or LLM performance evaluation pipelines

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering leadership at staff level
